MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Roni Hayom in pro per for Appellant/Defendant ASAP Relocation, Inc.
Larry Loyd, Respondant/Plaintiff in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for a Trial de Novo. The court advises the Appellant that the notice of appeal was not filed timely. The court does not have authority to rehear the matter and indicates that the judgment will have to stand.

Court stands adjourned.

Judge Katherine Feinstein, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported. (220)
